add clean up landscape around heli pad...front and

--- "Miles Alexander, LSJ" littlestjames@yahoo.com
wrote:

Greetings

The following are some projects and other issues
that arose from the visit ending 2 January 2006

  1. Owners road. Reposition the statue and plant
    two coconut trees in area indicated by JE.

  2. Owners road and parking area. Light up entire
    area.

  3. Master Bedroom. Install exterior security
    light. Installed. Bush needs to be pruned to lighten
    up area.

  4. Master bedroom. Install track lights

  5. Master bedroom. Install hot tub and mimic the
    interior bath surround in terms of size and color.

  6. Heli steps. Concrete steps and finish with
    pillars like gym. Stone finish similar to main
    house. Floor tile is coral stone, same as main
    house.
    Purchases

  7. John Deere Gator HPX diesel 4*4. This vehicle
    is for the use of the landscaping couple joining the
    staff of LSJ. JE approved purchase.

  8. Staff uniforms. Sets of uniforms for all staff.
    Per Cathy's list. Approved by JE.

  9. Tools and Storage.Various storage units etc for
    new building. JE approved list.

Regards

Miles and Cathy
